description_long: This is a low-cut, lace-up casual shoe featuring a dark brown upper adorned with a repeating gold monogram pattern reminiscent of luxury designer motifs. The shoe has a light beige midsole and outsole with subtle red accents on the tread, and a tan heel collar lining that adds a touch of contrast. The laces are light beige, threaded through four eyelets on each side, and the tongue is slightly padded for comfort. A prominent red logo is visible on the outer side of the shoe, adding a pop of color and brand identity. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, light gray material for added comfort. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A designer-inspired, low-cut lace-up shoe with a dark brown and gold monogram pattern, beige sole, and red logo accent. Features a comfortable padded collar and light beige laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full monogram pattern, red logo on the outer side, beige sole, and tan collar lining.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and the symmetry of the monogram pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the monogram pattern, red logo, and clear view of the sole's profile and heel structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel, tan collar lining, and the continuation of the monogram pattern around the back.
attribute_logo: Red oval logo with a stylized letter on the outer side near the laces
